hooks.name: Test Reminder After Task
hooks.description: After completing a spec task, reminds the agent to write Playwright tests for the delivered feature if none were created during the task.

action.prompt: STOP — before marking this task done, check: did you write Playwright tests for the feature you just built? Per the always-test steering rule, every feature needs minimum 2 positive + 2 negative tests in the tests/ directory. If no tests were written, write them NOW before proceeding. If tests were already written this session, confirm the test file name and count.
